title: Tilbury to Gravesend Tunnel Replacement Project: Section 37 consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Consent issued by the Secretary of State, including Secretary of State’s reasoned conclusions on an Environmental Impact Assessment Report, on the overhead lines relating to the Tilbury to Gravesend Tunnel Replacement Project  Date of decision  25 September 2025  Company/Location   National Grid PLCLondon   Type of Project  Overhead Electricity Transmission lines, S37 Consent, Electricity Act 1989 "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
